hero.title: Create Proposals in Seconds
hero.subtitle: Integrated with Parasut, send instantly via WhatsApp. Your customers accept with a single click.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by leading companies in Turkey

parasut.title: Parasut Integration
parasut.desc: Your customer and product cards sync automatically. Create proposals with one click.

whatsapp.title: Send via WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Prepare your proposal, send it instantly via WhatsApp. Your customer responds through an interactive link.

tracking.title: Live Tracking
tracking.desc: When did your customer open the proposal? How many times did they review it? See all activities in real-time.

fast.title: Proposal in 60 Seconds
fast.desc: Drag-and-drop product selection, automatic pricing. Even someone who never used a system can easily prepare it.

response.title: Accept / Revise / Reject
response.desc: Your customer responds directly from the proposal link. You are instantly notified.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.desc: Acceptance rates, average response times, most preferred products. Make data-driven decisions.

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try free for 14 days, no credit card required.

items.q: Can I use it without a Parasut account?
items.a: Yes! Parasut integration is optional. You can enter your customer and product information manually. However, if you connect Parasut, all your data will sync automatically.

items.q: How does the WhatsApp integration work?
items.a: We use the WhatsApp Business API. When you prepare a proposal, an interactive proposal link is sent to the relevant contact with a single click. The customer can review the proposal and accept, request a revision, or reject it through this link.
After signing up, you can use all Professional plan features free for 14 days. No credit card required. When the trial period ends, simply choose a plan.
All your data is encrypted with SSL/TLS. We use GDPR-compliant infrastructure. Your data is hosted on servers in the Europe (Frankfurt) region.

site.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to grow your business in one platform
site.ctaTrialNote: 14 days free trial · No credit card required
site.footerDesc: Proposal management platform with Parasut integration

demoPage.heroDescription: Explore step by step. Click on each screen to examine.
demoPage.stepDashboardSubtitle: See your entire business at a glance
demoPage.stepDashboardDescription: Revenue, proposal count, acceptance rate and customer statistics are instantly in front of you. Stock alerts and latest proposals are always visible.
demoPage.stepProductsDescription: Products automatically synced from Parasut. Stock tracking, cost calculation, recipe management and supplier information in one card.
demoPage.stepCustomersDescription: Customer information is automatically updated with Parasut integration. Balance tracking, contact information and proposal history together.
demoPage.stepCreateProposalDescription: Select customer, add products, set price and discount. Error-free proposals with automatic VAT calculation and currency support.
demoPage.stepWhatsappSubtitle: Reach your customer with one touch
demoPage.stepWhatsappDescription: Send your prepared proposal via WhatsApp with one click. Your customer sees it instantly on mobile, approves with one click.
demoPage.stepAnalyticsDescription: Monthly revenue trend, best-selling products, customer-based analytics. Track your business growth with charts.
